headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-06)

headlines.h: Markets React To: Post haste Jenkins
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
